Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel (Further) Answers To Interrogatories, (Further) Responses To Request Admissions, And (Further) Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Interrogatories
1 - 3, 6
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. D is ordered to respond further by September 28, 2005.
5
denied
7
The interrogatory is redrafted to add the phrase 'referred to in the complaint'. Defendant is ordered to further respond by September 28, 2005.
Request for production of documents
The motion is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. D is ordered to respond and produce documents by September 28, 2005.
Request for admissions
Any reference to the general objections is stricken. There is no provision for general objections in the Code of Civil Procedure.
1
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. The answer is otherwise sufficient
2
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. D is ordered to serve a further response by September 28, 2005.
3
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant's response must comply with CCP Section 2033.220(c)
5
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. D is ordered to serve a further response by September 28, 2005.
6
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken as well as the qualifying phrase 'but denies the remainder of the request' pursuant to CCP 2033.220(b)(1). The answer is otherwise sufficient
7,8
denied
The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
